label: 第117話
source_locator: 単行本14巻 目次 p.27
summary_short: 伏黒は最後の手段として、八握剣異戒神将魔虚羅を召喚する。重面とともに調伏の儀へ組み込まれ、伏黒を利用したい宿儺が介入する。
summary_full: 瀕死の伏黒は、重面を巻き込んで十種影法術の未調伏式神「八握剣異戒神将魔虚羅」を召喚する。伏黒は過去に五条から、十種影法術の使い手と六眼・無下限呪術の当主が相打ちになった因縁を聞いていた。第三者を参加させた調伏は成功扱いにならないが、相手を道連れにできる最後の手段だった。魔虚羅は伏黒と重面を倒し、伏黒の死を避けたい宿儺が儀式へ介入する。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: Clinging to life after being surprise attacked by the 呪詛師 重面春太 , 恵 unveils his last resort. He forces 重面 into an unbeatable exorcism ritual against the out-of-control 式神 魔虚羅 ! 重面 is obviously no match for the creature, but 宿儺 comes to the rescue in order to ensure his plans for the young jujutsu student go uninhibited.
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: 恵 creating distance while explaining his technique to 重面. Exhausted and injured, 恵 slowly walks away from his assailant. He tells 重面 that the 十種影法術 術式 begins when the sorcerer who inherited the technique receives two 玉犬 . In order to use other 式神, they must be summoned and defeated by the sorcerer with the help of 玉犬. This allows the user to gain more 式神, repeating this method until they can amass up to ten different ones. Uninterested in 恵's stalling, 重面 asks if the young sorcerer is done talking yet. 恵 crosses the road away from the 呪詛師, leaving a trail of blood behind from his injuries. 重面 notices that 恵 isn't letting him get close despite being on his last legs. Even so, 重面 feels like he won't even need to finish his adversary off. Moments later 恵 collapses and hits the ground with a hard thud, proving his point. 悟 explains why the 禪院 and 五条 clans hate each other. 恵 struggles to get up, but he continues to divulge how the 十種影法術 術式 works. Other people can help the user with the exorcism ritual, but this will nullify the technique once the respective 式神 is defeated. This makes it a pointless exorcism, but even a pointless exorcism has its uses to 恵. At some point in the past, 五条 sensei explained to 恵 why the 禪院家 and the 五条 Clan are on such bad terms. Hundreds of years ago, perhaps the Keicho Period, the heads of each household killed each other in battle. The 五条家 head was a 無下限呪術 user with the 六眼 , and the 禪院家 head possessed the 十種影法術 術式. 悟 implied that 恵 could possibly rise to his level one day. However, in the present, 恵 still doesn't quite believe he could become stronger than his mentor. 恵 summons the uncontrollable 魔虚羅! 恵 decides to use his last resort and believes the head of the household at that time that defeated the 六眼 used the 十種影法術 術式 this way as well. Meanwhile, 漏瑚 's 極ノ番「隕」 hits the ground in the distance, shaking the ground and getting 重面's attention. He asks himself who the showoff could be and 恵 redirects his attention back to his explanation. 恵 finishes divulging his technique by revealing that a ten shadows technique user cannot use a 式神 unless it's been exorcised. However, they can be summoned at any time using an exorcism ritual. 重面 turns back around and notices 恵's sudden influx of 呪力 . The 東京 呪術高専 student claims that not a single 十種影法術 術式 user has ever been able to exorcise the shinigami he's about to bring forth. " I'll be the first to pass on. Good luck. " 重面 realizes his adversaries plan too late. 恵 summons the 八握剣異戒神将 魔虚羅 魔虚羅, dragging his opponent into an unbeatable exorcism ritual. 重面 realizes terms with the grim situation he's in. He must fight to survive with 恵 but the student is in no shape to fight. On his last legs, 恵 silently apologizes to 悠仁 and then tells 重面 good luck before passing on. 魔虚羅 hits 恵 aside, crashing his body into a nearby building and incapacitating him. 重面 is shocked by 恵's willingness to sacrifice himself and curses him for it, demanding the jujutsu sorcerer get back up and stop this cruel game. After defeating 漏瑚 and encountering 裏梅 , 宿儺 notices something is wrong. He feels this is urgent and leaves 裏梅 behind after telling them not to neglect their preparations. 宿儺 disappears and 裏梅 says they'll be awaiting his return. 宿儺 saves the "trash" from 魔虚羅 in order to rescue 恵. Just before 魔虚羅 crushes 重面, 宿儺 saves the 呪詛師 with immense speed. He reads the situation instantly and recognizes 恵 is in a suspended state of death. 宿儺 was right to save 重面 because he was dragged into the exorcism ritual. If the 呪詛師 were to die, 伏黒恵 would as well. To prevent this, 宿儺 uses a 反転術式 to heal 恵, telling him there's still something he needs the student to do. 重面 wants to comment but 宿儺 tells him to stay there and to stay quiet. 宿儺 surmises that in order to save 恵, he needs to defeat the 式神. Despite being an outsider of the ritual, exorcising 魔虚羅 will void the ritual completely. 宿儺 takes his fighting pose and says he'd like to begin the battle with just a little taste.
candidate_evidence.characters_raw_text: 伏黒恵 重面春太 五条悟 (回想) 宿儺 裏梅
candidate_evidence.locations_raw_text: 渋谷 外 渋谷駅 前 渋谷 109 外 渋谷駅 前 渋谷 109 前 渋谷 109
candidate_evidence.techniques_raw_text: 伏黒恵の術式 十種影法術 術式 八握剣異戒神将 魔虚羅 魔虚羅 八握剣異戒神将 魔虚羅 魔虚羅 宿儺の術式 反転術式 術式

key_events_verified_phase6: 伏黒が魔虚羅の調伏の儀を開始する
五条家と禪院家の当主が相打ちになった過去が示される
魔虚羅が伏黒と重面を戦闘不能にする
宿儺が伏黒を救うため儀式へ参加する
verification_notes_phase6: 集英社公式12～14巻目次と巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別記事、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した第六段階。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
